## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e:ci`
- [ ] Added or updated regression tests where behaviour changed
- [ ] Tested keyboard and touch behaviour when the interface changed
- [ ] Checked light, dark, 390px, and 320px layouts when the interface changed
- [ ] Refreshed the generated root artifacts with `npm run build`

## Compatibility and safety

- [ ] Schema-v1 workspaces and share links remain compatible, or the impact is explained below
- [ ] No user-provided content is inserted through `innerHTML`
- [ ] No telemetry, external runtime asset, or background network dependency was introduced
- [ ] Provider and CIDR behaviour is covered by tests when relevant
